name: Daikon and Tuna Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can tuna; drained (keep 1 tablespoon for dressing)
1 tablespoon juice from the tuna -- mix well
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the well-drained tuna flakes into a bowl.
2. Add daikon, onion, and okra to the bowl; mix well.
3. Pour the dressing over the tuna mixture and mix thoroughly.
4. Toss everything into a serving platter and serve.
